summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing completed for credit card recommendation system. All major features working including AI-powered explanations via GPT-5.2, multi-step wizard, filtering, comparison, and card details.

minor_issues.issue: Individual card endpoint returns 405 Method Not Allowed instead of 404

ui_warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in modal dialogs
HTML hydration warnings for nested table elements

passed_tests: Landing page loads with navigation and hero section
Admin panel: Display seeded cards (6 cards)
Admin panel: Edit card modal opens and form works
Admin panel: Add card modal opens and form validation works
Recommendation wizard: Step 1 (Credit score, income, existing cards)
Recommendation wizard: Step 2 (Spending categories with sliders)
AI recommendation generation with GPT-5.2 explanations
Results page: Display 4 personalized recommendations with scores
Results page: Sorting by rewards works
Card comparison: Select multiple cards and view comparison table
Card details: Tabbed interface (Rewards, Eligibility, Benefits, Charges)
Backend API: GET /api/cards returns seeded cards
Backend API: POST /api/recommend generates AI explanations
Backend API: POST /api/compare works for selected cards
Backend API: Card CRUD operations (Create, Update, Delete)
